about.storesDesc: Before being a website, DBC is 11 stores across France where you can touch, test and walk out with your phone.
about.teamDesc: Refurbishment experts who test, verify and prepare every device with care.
about.planetDesc: Every refurbished phone means less electronic waste and a concrete step for the planet.
about.warrantyDesc: Twice as much as the competition. We stand behind the quality of our products with a solid guarantee.
about.historyP1: DBC was born from a simple observation: buying a quality refurbished smartphone shouldn't be complicated. Too often, customers face vague descriptions, misleading cosmetic grades and non-existent customer service.
about.historyP2: That's why we created DBC: a brand that puts transparency and quality at the center of everything. Every device goes through our 24-point inspection process before reaching your hands.
about.missionP1: We're shaking up the industry. Our goal is to make refurbished tech accessible to everyone, without compromising on quality. We believe it's possible to offer premium smartphones at fair prices, while having a positive impact on the environment.
about.valueSimple: Simple — No jargon, no surprises. We tell you exactly what you're buying.
about.valueInspiring: Inspiring — The future, in your hands. Choosing refurbished is choosing a smarter way to consume.
about.valueStrong: Strong — 24-month warranty, 30 days to change your mind, and a customer service team that actually responds.
about.storesContentP1: DBC has 11 physical stores in France. You can come discover our products, test them on the spot and leave with your new phone the same day. Our in-store teams are here to advise you and answer all your questions.

quality.processIntro: Every device that enters our workshop goes through a rigorous 24-point inspection process. This isn't just a power-on test: we verify every component, every feature, every detail.
quality.processSensors: Sensor verification (Face ID, Touch ID, accelerometer, gyroscope)
quality.processConnectivity: Connectivity test (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular network, GPS)
quality.processButtons: Physical buttons and vibration motor test
quality.processReset: Full factory reset and software update
quality.gradesContentIntro: At DBC, no surprises. Every device is graded based on its actual cosmetic condition, with photos of the product you'll receive.
quality.gradePerfectDesc: No visible marks to the naked eye. The device is in near-new condition. Ideal if aesthetics are your priority.
quality.gradeVeryGoodDesc: Slight micro-scratches visible only under certain lighting angles. The device remains in excellent overall condition.
quality.gradeGoodDesc: Visible signs of use (light scratches on screen or chassis). The best value for money, with perfect functionality.
quality.gradeImperfectDesc: More pronounced signs of wear (scratches, small dents). The lowest price for a 100% functional device.
quality.batteryContentIntro: The battery is a key part of the user experience. That's why we give you the choice:
quality.batteryOriginal: Original battery — Tested and certified with a minimum capacity of 80%.
quality.batteryNewOption: New battery — Replacement with a new battery for maximum battery life (option available on every product).
quality.warrantyContentP1: All our products come with a 24-month commercial warranty, 12 months more than most of the market. This warranty covers internal technical defects, sudden and unforeseeable malfunctions, parts and labor included.
quality.warrantyContentP2: In case of any issue, our customer service responds within 4 business hours and handles the entire repair or replacement.

contact.storesDesc: Find us in one of our 11 physical stores in France. Our teams are available to advise you, let you test our products and answer all your questions.
contact.afterSalesP1: An issue with your order? Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9am to 7pm. The fastest way to reach us is via WhatsApp or phone.
contact.afterSalesP2: For any request regarding an existing order, please provide your order number so we can process your request as quickly as possible.
contact.pressDesc: For any press or partnership inquiries, contact us by email at <link>contact@dbcstore.fr</link>.

help.deliveryTimesA: We ship within 24 business hours. Colissimo or Mondial Relay delivery typically takes 48 to 72 hours. You can also pick up your order at our workshop within 2 hours of notification.
help.deliveryFreeA: Shipping costs are displayed before payment. Pickup at DBC workshop is always free.
help.returnTimeQ: How long do I have to return a product?
help.returnTimeA: You have 30 calendar days from receipt to exercise your right of withdrawal. The return label is free and covered by DBC.
help.returnHowQ: How do I initiate a return?
help.returnHowA: Contact us via WhatsApp, phone or email with your order number. We'll send you a prepaid label within 4 business hours.
help.refundTimeQ: How long does a refund take?
help.refundTimeA: The refund is initiated within 2 business days of receiving your return. Bank processing takes approximately 3 to 5 additional business days.
help.warrantyDurationA: All our refurbished products come with a 24-month commercial warranty, 12 months more than most of the market.
help.warrantyCoverageA: The warranty covers internal technical defects, sudden and unforeseeable malfunctions, parts and labor included. It does not cover normal wear and tear, oxidation or breakage.
help.paymentMethodsQ: What payment methods do you accept?
help.paymentMethodsA: We accept credit cards (Visa, MasterCard), PayPal and SEPA bank transfers. Payment is only charged upon shipment of your order.

shipping.s1P1: By using this site, you accept these terms of use in their entirety. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time, and such modifications will take effect immediately upon publication on the site. It is your responsibility to regularly review these terms to stay informed of any changes.
shipping.s2P1: You agree to use this site solely for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You are prohibited from:
shipping.s2Li1: Using the site in a manner that violates any applicable local, national or international law or regulation.
shipping.s2Li2: Using the site for commercial purposes without our prior written authorization.
shipping.s2Li3: Attempting to gain unauthorized access to any part of our site, other accounts, computer systems or networks connected to our site.
shipping.s2Li4: Transmitting any unsolicited or unauthorized advertising or promotional material.
shipping.s3P1: To access certain features of our site, you will need to create a user account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information when registering and to update this information as needed. You are responsible for the confidentiality of your password and all activities carried out under your account.
shipping.s4P1: You retain all ownership rights to content you submit, display or publish on our site. By publishing content on our site, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, transferable and sublicensable license to use, reproduce, distribute, prepare derivative works, display and perform this content in connection with providing our services.
shipping.s5P1: All content and materials available on our site, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, audio clips, videos and software, are the property of DBC Electronics or its licensors and are protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws.
shipping.s6P1: Our site is provided "as is" and "as available" without any warranty of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee that the use of our site will be uninterrupted or error-free.
shipping.s7P1: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless DBC Electronics, its officers, directors, employees and agents, from any claim, loss, liability, expense, including attorney's fees, arising from your use of our site or your violation of these terms.
shipping.s8P1: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to our site at any time, without notice, for any reason, including but not limited to violation of these terms.
shipping.s9P1: These terms of use are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of France. You agree to submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Paris, France to resolve any dispute arising from or related to these terms or your use of our site.

cgv.intro: At DBC, every line of these Terms of Sale is designed to simplify your life: transparent pricing, human customer service and lightning-fast interventions on your refurbished devices.
cgv.s0P1: DBC PARIS 17 BIS, SAS registered with RCS Paris 922 178 488, VAT FR28922178488, headquarters 110 avenue de Villiers, 75017 Paris.
cgv.s0P2: Customer service: WhatsApp (icon on website) — response < 4 business hours | Phone: 07 43 39 66 69 — response < 1 business hour | Email: contact@dbcstore.fr — response < 24 business hours
cgv.s1P1: These General Terms of Sale apply to all orders placed on dbcstore.fr. By confirming your purchase, you accept these terms without reservation.
cgv.s2Li1: Buyer: any person (consumer or professional) purchasing a Product for non-commercial use.
cgv.s2Li2: Products: refurbished or new electronic devices, accessories and associated services.
cgv.s3P1: Creating an account is recommended but never mandatory: you can place an order as a "guest".
cgv.s3P2: Express checkout: selection • cart • shipping/payment • confirmation. Payment constitutes a commitment to pay.
cgv.s3P3: We confirm availability within 24 hours. If a Product is ultimately unavailable, we cancel and refund immediately.
cgv.s4Li1: Prices in euros including VAT, shown excluding any shipping costs.
cgv.s4Li2: Accepted methods: credit card (Visa, MasterCard), SEPA bank transfer.
cgv.s4Li3: Payment is charged upon shipment or pickup, never before your package moves.
cgv.s5P1: Ownership and risk are transferred upon physical delivery of the package, once full payment has been received.
cgv.s6P1: You have 30 days to change your mind. A WhatsApp message, a call or an email is all it takes and we'll send you a prepaid return label within 4 business hours. You then have 14 days to ship the Product in its original condition.
cgv.s6P2: We refund within a maximum of 14 days after receipt, initial shipping costs included.
cgv.s6P3: Exceptions: personalized items, opened in-ear headphones, unsealed sealed accessories.
cgv.s7_2Li1: Instant interventions: 90% of repairs or exchanges are done on the spot at our workshop.
cgv.s7_2Li2: Maximum commitment: never more than 3 business days to resolve an issue, original parts included.
cgv.s7_2Li3: Zero fees: shipping, diagnostics and labor covered by DBC.
cgv.s7_2Li4: Plan B: if repair is impossible or exceeds 3 days, you choose between equivalent replacement, 12-month store credit or full refund.
cgv.s7_2Exclusions: Exclusions: oxidation, breakage, normal battery wear, improper use.
cgv.s8P1: A problem? Contact us via WhatsApp, phone or email. Guaranteed response < 24 business hours.
cgv.s8P2: In case of persistent disagreement, you can contact the FEVAD e-commerce Mediator or the European Commission's ODR platform.
cgv.s9P1: DBC is responsible for proper contract execution, except in cases of force majeure or obvious product misuse.
cgv.s10P1: We protect your data: limited processing, encrypted and GDPR-compliant. Exercise your rights at privacy@dbcstore.fr.
cgv.s11P1: All content (logos, text, photos) belongs to DBC or its partners.
cgv.s12P1: French law applies. The competent courts shall be those designated by the Code of Civil Procedure if no amicable solution is reached.

privacy.responsibleP1: The data controller is the company DBC (Don't Be Classic), SAS with a share capital of 1,000 euros, registered with the RCS of Lille under number 932 888 003, headquartered at 73 rue Nationale, 59800 Lille.
privacy.collectedIntro: As part of our business, we collect the following personal data:
privacy.collectedId: Identification data: last name, first name, email address, phone number, postal address.
privacy.collectedOrder: Order data: order history, delivery addresses, payment method used (excluding card numbers).
privacy.collectedNav: Browsing data: IP address, browser type, pages visited, visit duration.
privacy.purposeIntro: Your personal data is processed for the following purposes:
privacy.purposeAccount: Management of your customer account and orders
privacy.purposeLegal: Compliance with our legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.legalBasisP1: The processing of your data is based on the following legal grounds: execution of the sales contract, your consent (for commercial communications and non-essential cookies), our legitimate interest (service improvement, fraud prevention) and compliance with our legal obligations.
privacy.retentionClients: Customer data: 3 years after the last order or last contact.
privacy.cookiesP1: Our site uses cookies to ensure proper operation and improve your experience. Essential cookies (session, cart) are necessary for the site to function. Analytical cookies allow us to understand how you use our site and are only placed with your consent.
privacy.sharingIntro: Your personal data may be shared with the following service providers, strictly within the scope of providing our services:
privacy.sharingNoSell: We never sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.rightsIntro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:
privacy.rightAccess: Right of access: obtain a copy of your personal data.
privacy.rightErasure: Right to erasure: request the deletion of your data.
privacy.rightPortability: Right to portability: receive your data in a structured format.
privacy.rightObjection: Right to object: object to the processing of your data.
privacy.rightRestriction: Right to restriction: restrict the processing of your data.
privacy.rightsExercise: To exercise your rights, contact us by email at <link>contact@dbcstore.fr</link>. We commit to responding within 30 days.
privacy.complaintP1: If you believe that the processing of your personal data constitutes a violation of the GDPR, you can file a complaint with the CNIL (Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés) at <cnil>www.cnil.fr</cnil>.

legal.ipP1: The content of the site, including text, images, graphics, logos, icons, sounds, software, and other elements are the exclusive property of DBC Electronics, unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction, distribution, modification, adaptation, retransmission or publication of these elements is strictly prohibited without the prior written consent of DBC Electronics.
legal.dataP1: DBC Electronics is committed to protecting the privacy of its users in accordance with applicable personal data protection laws, including the GDPR. Exercise your rights at privacy@dbcstore.fr.
legal.cookiesP1: The site uses cookies to improve user experience, analyze site traffic and personalize content. By using our site, you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with our cookie policy.
legal.linksP1: The site may contain hyperlinks to other websites. DBC Electronics accepts no liability for the content of these external sites. Users access these links at their own risk.
legal.liabilityP1: DBC Electronics makes every effort to provide accurate and up-to-date information on its site. However, we do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the information available on the site. DBC Electronics cannot be held liable for any direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of the site.
legal.lawP1: These legal notices are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, the competent courts of Paris shall have sole jurisdiction.

refund.intro: At DBC, we want to offer a simpler and more flexible experience than what most refurbished marketplaces provide. If a device doesn't suit you, we do everything to make the return, exchange or refund as frictionless as possible.
refund.s1Title: 1. Right of withdrawal — 30 days to change your mind
refund.s1P1: You have 30 calendar days from receipt of your product to exercise your right of withdrawal, without having to justify your decision.
refund.s1Li1: The day of delivery is not counted.
refund.s1Li2: If the deadline falls on a Saturday, Sunday or public holiday, it is extended to the next business day.
refund.s1Li3: No charges: the return shipping label and insurance are fully covered by DBC Store.
refund.s2P1: No need to fill out a long form — two quick options:
refund.s2Li1: WhatsApp: click the green icon in the bottom right corner of any page, then simply send your order number.
refund.s2Li3: Email: write to us at contact@dbcstore.fr with subject "Return – Order No. XXXX".
refund.s2P2: We respond within 4 business hours with: your prepaid label (Colissimo or Mondial Relay, your choice), the packaging guide, and the proposed pickup date.
refund.s3Li1: Back up your data and factory reset the device.
refund.s3Li2: Unlink all accounts (iCloud, Google, Samsung) and remove the eSIM.
refund.s3Li3: Include in the package: order number, date, first name, last name (or the printed invoice).
refund.s3Li4: Use a rigid box, bubble wrap or foam. Bubble mailers are not accepted.
refund.s3Li5: Photograph the device and the sealed package; keep the photos until the case is closed.
refund.s4P1: The timeline starts from confirmation of receipt at our warehouse. You will receive a confirmation email and an update in "My account".
refund.s5P1: All refurbished products sold by DBC Store are covered by a 24-month commercial warranty, 12 months more than most competitors in the industry.
refund.s5P2: We prioritize fast repairs (≤ 3 business days for smartphones/tablets, ≤ 5 business days for laptops). If repair is impossible or exceeds 10 business days, you can choose between an equivalent replacement, a 12-month store credit, or a full refund.
refund.s5P3: Shipping costs related to warranty interventions are fully covered by DBC.
refund.s6Li2: Depreciation due to mishandling: restoration quote sent before deduction.
refund.s6Li3: Personalized products (engraving, specific software configuration): right of withdrawal limited to the value of the raw hardware.
refund.s7P1: If the carrier has not scanned your return within 10 business days, contact us; we will either send a new shipment or process your full refund after investigation.
refund.s8Li1: WhatsApp: green icon on the website (response < 4 business hours)
refund.s8P1: Our team is available Monday to Friday, 9am – 7pm (Paris time).
